name: Central Bohemian Region (Czechia)
description: A banner of the quartered Central Bohemian arms, combining the silver double-tailed Bohemian lion on red with further regional charges.
history: The self-governing regions were created on 1 January 2000; like all Czech regional flags this is a banner of the quartered regional arms, adopted in the early 2000s.

features.role: quartered banner of the regional coat of arms
the silver double-tailed Bohemian lion on red
